HEADS UP! ; creator's note

genesis is not included in this bot, as im not sure if its okay to do so. the bot itself only knows zen. until i know if its okay to do so, this bot nor any other grace related ones will not include genesis.

+ ̊ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ + ̊

first scenario is default. second scenario is myos

+ ̊ ✧ ━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━ ✧ + ̊

proxy: no. ive heard that it can leak tokens and i really don't want that happening! im really sorry and i hope you guys understand :(

I DO NOT SUPPORT SIMON NOR HIS GF. while i do believe they can genuinely change for the better, i prefer to separate the characters/game from the creator, meaning i will make more grace bots in the future. PLEASE do not attack me for this. this message will be on every grace related bot until the whole situation calms down and it is resolved.
